## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

Closes #(issue number, if any)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup

## How was this tested

Describe how you verified the change. For the extension, note the steps you ran
on leetcode.com. For Python, note that `pytest` passes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is based on `main` and I am opening a PR (no direct pushes)
- [ ] JavaScript passes `node --check`, manifest is valid JSON
- [ ] Python tests pass (`pytest`), if I touched `src/`
- [ ] No em dashes in code, comments, or docs
- [ ] No remote or CDN scripts added to the extension
- [ ] PR is focused on a single topic
